mapper.sql: id, user_id, nick_name, ip, method, url, user_agent, event_type, status, error_msg, cost_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_access_log (user_id, nick_name, ip, user_agent, status, error_msg, method, url, event_type, cost_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickName}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{method}, #{url}, #{eventType}, #{costTime})

INSERT INTO sys_access_log (user_id, nick_name, ip, user_agent, status, error_msg, method, url, event_type, cost_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.ip}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.status}, #{item.errorMsg}, #{item.method}, #{item.url}, #{item.eventType}, #{item.costTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_access_log WHERE create_time < #{beforeTime} LIMIT 10000
